notes: Real-account deployable capital is set to $250,000.
Copy-to-real is manual only. Verify live bid/ask, margin impact, and account risk in TWS.
Do not copy stale signals, event-risk setups, or trades that violate your separate real-account rules.
Covered calls require matching real-account shares in TWS/manual tracker before order entry.
Iron condors are manual review only until four-leg execution and close lifecycle automation are validated.
